title: tragacantha micranthella
intro: Tragacantha micranthella, also known as Astragalus gummifer, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a shrub native to the Middle East and Central Asia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and improve overall immune function. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha micranthella is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its health benefits.
